title: Surfaced forgotten preference
event_text: Echo recalled a 90-day-old preference about commit message format and surfaced it to the review queue, where git-committer found it directly relevant to a PR under review.

title: Security block on auth-service PR
event_text: git-committer flagged PR #142 (auth-service token rotation) as blocking: a hardcoded expiry constant was found in the refresh path. rev-sec agreed; rev-style had already approved.

title: Glossary term added: ablation
event_text: open-translate added 'ablation study' to shared.glossary after encountering the term in three separate documents. The Japanese rendering (アブレーション実験) was flagged as a new consensus term.

title: Front-door unlock refused
event_text: Skippy refused an unlock request for the front door at 03:52 UTC — outside the configured allowed hours window (06:00–23:00 local). The refusal was logged with reason 'curfew_policy'.

title: Nightly PR sweep complete
event_text: git-committer processed 7 open PRs: 4 approved, 2 blocked (including auth-service), 1 deferred pending human review. Code-conventions namespace updated with two new entries.

title: Stale device preference pruned
event_text: Echo pruned a 180-day-old lighting preference for a device no longer registered. The prune was confirmed by Skippy's device list returning no match.

title: Showrunner bootstrap complete
event_text: Showrunner came online for the first time. Verified read access to memory_events and shared namespaces. No prior episodes found — registry initialised.

title: Batch translation: policy docs
event_text: open-translate completed a batch of 12 policy document segments (EN→JA). Confidence scores ranged 0.87–0.96. Two segments queued for human review due to domain-specific legal terminology.

title: Cross-agent link discovered
event_text: Echo identified that the 'ablation' term added by open-translate this morning matches a research reference in echo.private from 14 days ago. Cross-reference logged.

title: Morning routine executed
event_text: Skippy ran the 06:00 morning routine: lights to 80%, thermostat to 20°C, coffee maker started. All devices responded within timeout. Routine marked complete.
